news.t: Best Low-Volatility ETFs for When the Market is a Roller Coaster

holdings.infoBox: EEMV is an equity ETF with a total of 347 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electro-Mechanics stock at 2.84%, SK hynix at 1.99%, Samsung Electronics at 1.73%, SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS NON VOTING PRE at 1.73%, and United Microelectronics at 1.64%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Min Vol Factor ETF (EEMV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EM Minimum Volatility index. The fund tracks an index of emerging markets firms selected and weighted to create a low volatility portfolio. EEMV was launched on Oct 18, 2011 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Best Low-Volatility ETFs for When the Market is a Roller Coaster
data.text: It's been a volatile few years for the stock market, and that has investors sniffing out low-volatility ETFs. Just understand their strengths and their limitations.

data.title: ETF Edge, May 13, 2019
data.text: Bob Pisani breaks down the latest ETF trends with Tom Lydon of ETFTrends.com and Alfred Eskandar of Salt Financial.
